svg.text: 每个 HBM stack 有独立的内部结构:
HBM2e Stack (8-Hi):

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 8 个 Channel (每层 DRAM die 提供 1 个 channel)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 实际是 16 个 Pseudo-Channel (每个 channel 分成 2 个半独立的)
每个 Pseudo-Channel:
数据宽度: 64 bit

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 独立的行缓冲区 (Row Buffer)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 独立的命令接口

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 但与另一半 channel 共享某些内部资源
每个 Channel (2 个 Pseudo-Channel):
数据宽度: 128 bit
时钟: 1.215 GHz (HBM2e, A100)
DDR (双倍数据率): 有效 2.430 GT/s
每 channel 带宽: 128 bit × 2.430 GT/s = 38.9 GB/s
每 Stack 总带宽: 8 channels × 38.9 GB/s ≈ 311 GB/s

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: (实际稍高, A100 实测 ~410 GB/s/stack, 因为实际时钟可能更高)
DRAM 内部的 Bank 结构:
每个 Pseudo-Channel:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 16 个 Bank (HBM2e)
每个 Bank:
Row Buffer: 存储当前打开的行 (~1KB - 2KB)
Bank 是独立的: 不同 Bank 可以并行操作

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 但同一 Bank 的不同行需要先 Close 再 Open (Row Conflict)
Bank Group: 4 个 Bank 为一组

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 同一 Bank Group 内的 Bank 共享某些IO → 有轻微竞争

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 这意味着什么?

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 1. 如果所有请求打在同一个 Bank → 串行化 (Bank Conflict!)
Row Buffer 命中: ~10ns
Row Conflict (需要 precharge + activate): ~30-40ns

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 2. 如果请求分散在不同 Bank/Channel → 高度并行

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 16 Bank × 16 Pseudo-Channel = 256 个并行访问点 / Stack
3. GPU Memory Controller 的工作就是:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 将来自 SM 的请求路由到正确的 Channel/Bank

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 重排序请求以最大化 Row Buffer 命中率

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 管理 Bank Group 间的时序约束
4. 这也解释了为什么合并访问重要:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 连续地址 → 同一行 → Row Buffer 命中 → 快

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 随机地址 → 不同行 → Row Conflict → 慢
